title: XML Processing Instruction
text:
XML Processing Instruction Processing instructions embed an application name and an instruction within tags. Conversion to Struct To convert an XML processing instruction is converted to a Struct, use xmlToStruct /full . This converts it to a named Struct called appName , with the annotation xmlClass set to processing-instruction . The Struct has one nameless scalar member. When converted without the /full switch, processing instructions are ignored. Example: XML to Struct Conversion: Processing Instructions XML code with element with embedded processing instruction:

Copy After conversion, string returned by $dbgString [] [p] [$tags] [xmlClass] = element [xm-replace_text] = Enter text [$tags] [xmlClass] = processing-instruction Copy Was this topic helpful? Like Dislike
